name: Pumpkin Empanadas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pumpkin, 3/4 cup sugar, and allspice in a bowl; stir well.
2. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, mix flour, 1/2 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Cut in shortening using a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
5. Sprinkle 1 cup of milk evenly over the surface.
6. Stir with a fork until all dry ingredients are moistened.
7. Shape into a ball; chill.
8. Roll out to 1/8-inch thickness and cut into 4-inch circles.
9. Place 1 tablespoon of pumpkin mixture in the center of each circle.
10. Moisten edges with additional milk.
11. Fold in half and press edges together with a fork.
12. Brush empanadas with egg white.
13. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
14. Bake at 450°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until golden.
15. Combine 1/4 cup sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over empanadas while still warm.
